## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress and challenges in implementing website content and styles for Vapi's landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team has access to Vapi's GitHub repo, including landing page styles](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)
  - [Content creation is progressing well (\~6 pages expected live by week's end)](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Development speed is a top priority; Jordan willing to assist directly if needed](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [First page completion is crucial for scaling up the process efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)

## Topics

### GitHub Repository Access and Content

  - [GrowthX team confirmed access to Vapi's GitHub repository](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)
  - [Landing page repository contains all necessary styles](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [Jordan shared direct link to landing page repo during call](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [GrowthX team encouraged to push whatever progress they have to the repo](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

### Development Challenges and Solutions

  - [GrowthX team initially slowed by manual style building from Figma mockups](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
  - [Jordan clarified styles should be easily copy-pastable from existing landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [This revelation expected to significantly speed up development process](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Jordan offered to personally assist, even "stay up until 2 a.m." if needed](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)

### Content Progress and Expectations

  - [Editorial side progressing well: \~6 pages expected to go live by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Focus on speeding up development to match content creation pace](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Emphasis on demonstrating GrowthX's significant impact through data](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Collaboration and Communication

  - [Jordan offered to join a call with GrowthX developer after 4:30 PM](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Branko to sync with dev team (Marcus mentioned) and explore internal reinforcements](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Both parties aligned on prioritizing speed and efficient scaling of page creation](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Branko to immediately sync with GrowthX dev team about landing page repo access](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [GrowthX to locate and utilize existing styles from landing page repository](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Push current progress to GitHub repo for visibility and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Consider scheduling call with Jordan and GrowthX developer if needed (after 4:30 PM)](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Prioritize completing first page to establish workflow for rapid scaling](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Explore options for additional development support if speed remains an issue](https://fathom.video/share/5T5d3Zk1Zi1W6xiYVnynwa8XxZWhoxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
